name: core-lm-studio
description: Core LM Studio Windows desktop app with Electron, React, TypeScript, and a Python Core LM sidecar.
author: Core LM Authors

scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:build:main && concurrently -k "npm run desktop:dev:vite" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && electron apps/desktop/dist-electron/main.js"
scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:build:main && vite build --config apps/desktop/vite.config.ts
scripts.desktop:package:win: npm run desktop:prepare:python:win && npm run desktop:build && electron-builder --win --x64 --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.json
scripts.desktop:package:win:dir: npm run desktop:prepare:python:win && npm run desktop:build && electron-builder --win --x64 --dir --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.json
scripts.test:studio: npm run desktop:test && node scripts/run_python.mjs -m pytest -q
